scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run build:browser-runtime-layer && sst deploy --stage develop --config infra/sst.config.ts
scripts.local:deps: npm run build --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/libs-browser && npm run build --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/libs && npm run build --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/integration-discord && npm run build --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/repositories
scripts.local:batch-playground: npm run local:deps && npm --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/batch-playground run local
scripts.local:batch-anime-analysis: npm run local:deps && npm --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/batch-anime-analysis run local
scripts.lint: biome ci docs README.md package.json turbo.json tsconfig.base.json infra .github apps/*/README.md apps/*/src apps/*/docs apps/*/package.json apps/*/tsconfig.json packages/integrations/README.md packages/integrations/*/README.md packages/integrations/*/src packages/integrations/*/docs packages/integrations/*/package.json packages/integrations/*/tsconfig.json packages/libs/README.md packages/libs/docs packages/libs/browser/README.md packages/libs/browser/html-scraper packages/libs/browser/package.json packages/libs/browser/tsconfig.json packages/libs/utils/README.md packages/libs/utils/gacha packages/libs/utils/logger packages/libs/utils/string packages/libs/utils/package.json packages/libs/utils/tsconfig.json repositories/README.md repositories/anime repositories/package.json repositories/tsconfig.json && turbo run lint
scripts.format: biome format docs README.md package.json turbo.json tsconfig.base.json infra .github apps/*/README.md apps/*/src apps/*/docs apps/*/package.json apps/*/tsconfig.json packages/integrations/README.md packages/integrations/*/README.md packages/integrations/*/src packages/integrations/*/docs packages/integrations/*/package.json packages/integrations/*/tsconfig.json packages/libs/README.md packages/libs/docs packages/libs/browser/README.md packages/libs/browser/html-scraper packages/libs/browser/package.json packages/libs/browser/tsconfig.json packages/libs/utils/README.md packages/libs/utils/gacha packages/libs/utils/logger packages/libs/utils/string packages/libs/utils/package.json packages/libs/utils/tsconfig.json repositories/README.md repositories/anime repositories/package.json repositories/tsconfig.json
scripts.format:fix: biome format --write docs README.md package.json turbo.json tsconfig.base.json infra .github apps/*/README.md apps/*/src apps/*/docs apps/*/package.json apps/*/tsconfig.json packages/integrations/README.md packages/integrations/*/README.md packages/integrations/*/src packages/integrations/*/docs packages/integrations/*/package.json packages/integrations/*/tsconfig.json packages/libs/README.md packages/libs/docs packages/libs/browser/README.md packages/libs/browser/html-scraper packages/libs/browser/package.json packages/libs/browser/tsconfig.json packages/libs/utils/README.md packages/libs/utils/gacha packages/libs/utils/logger packages/libs/utils/string packages/libs/utils/package.json packages/libs/utils/tsconfig.json repositories/README.md repositories/anime repositories/package.json repositories/tsconfig.json
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
